politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: This Privacy Policy sets out how we, Telegram Messenger Inc. **(“Telegram”)**, use and protect your personal data that you provide to us, or that is otherwise obtained or generated by us, in connection with your use of our cloud-based messaging services (the **“Services”**).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: For the purposes of applicable data protection legislation is the data controller responsible for your personal data when you use our Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
we have designated a third party, European Data Protection Office (EDPO), as our representative pursuant to Article 27 of the GDPR. You can direct to EDPO any of your GDPR-related queries:

- by using EDPO’s online request form at https://edpo.com/telegram-gdpr-data-request or
- by writing to EDPO at Avenue Huart Hamoir 71, 1030 Brussels, Belgium.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You provide your mobile number and basic account data (which may include profile name, profile picture and about information) to create a Telegram account.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We process your personal data on the ground that such processing is necessary to further our legitimate interests (including: *(1)* providing effective and innovative Services to our users; and *(2)* to detect, prevent or otherwise address fraud or security issues in respect of our provision of Services), unless those interests are overridden by your interest or fundamental rights and freedoms that require protections of personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Unless stated otherwise in this Privacy Policy, the personal data that you provide us will only be stored for as long as it is necessary for us to fulfill our obligations in respect of the provision of the Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: To provide, improve and support our Services, we may share your personal data with: *(1)* our parent company, Telegram Group Inc, located in the British Virgin Islands, *(2)* Telegraph Inc., a group member also located in the BVI; and *(3)* Telegram FZ-LLC, a group member located in Dubai.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We employ all appropriate technical and organizational measures (including encryption of your personal data) to ensure a level of security for your personal data that is appropriate to the risk.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We store your up-to-date contacts in order to notify you as soon as one of your contacts signs up for Telegram and to properly display names in notifications.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: lodge a complaint with national data protection authorities regarding our processing of your personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: correct any inaccurate or incomplete personal data we hold on you

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: request a copy of all your personal data that we store and to transmit that copy to another data controller

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: delete (see section 10 below) or amend your personal data

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: restrict, or object to, the processing of your personal data

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: request a copy of all your personal data that we store and to transmit that copy to another data controller

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: restrict, or object to, the processing of your personal data

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: The only cookies we use are those to operate and provide our Services on the web.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: The cookies we use are small text files that allow us to provide and customize our Services, and in doing so provide you with an enhanced user experience.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: If you live in a country in the European Economic Area (EEA), the Services are provided by Telegram, which for the purposes of applicable data protection legislation is the data controller responsible for your personal data when you use our Services. However, as Telegram is located outside the EEA, we have designated a third party, European Data Protection Office (EDPO), as our representative pursuant to Article 27 of the GDPR.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
transferts_hors_ue.quote: If you signed up for Telegram from the UK or the EEA, your data is stored in data centers in the Netherlands.

identite.quote: You provide your mobile number and basic account data (which may include profile name, profile picture and about information) to create a Telegram account.
identite.purpose: Création et identification du compte utilisateur

contact.quote: We store your up-to-date contacts in order to notify you as soon as one of your contacts signs up for Telegram and to properly display names in notifications. We only need the number and name (first and last) for this to work and store no other data about your contacts.

compte_auth.quote: When you enable 2-step-verification for your account or store documents using the Telegram Passport feature, you can opt to set up a password recovery email.

paiement.purpose: Aucune collecte directe de données de paiement par Telegram

localisation.quote: If you share a location in a chat, this location data is treated like other messages in cloud or secret chats respectively. If you share your Live Location in any chat or turn on *’Make Myself Visible’* in People Nearby, Telegram will use your data to display your location to those users with whom you are sharing it, even when the app is closed – for as long as you keep these optional features activated.
localisation.purpose: Partage de localisation avec d'autres utilisateurs

appareil_technique.quote: We may collect metadata such as your IP address, devices and Telegram apps you've used, history of username changes, etc.
appareil_technique.purpose: Sécurité, prévention des abus et amélioration du service

usage_comportement.quote: We may use some aggregated data about how you use Telegram to build useful features. For example, when you open the Search menu, Telegram displays the people you are more likely to message in a box at the top of the screen. To do this, we calculate a rating that shows which people you message frequently.
usage_comportement.purpose: Amélioration de l'expérience utilisateur via des fonctionnalités personnalisées

contenus_utilisateur.quote: We store messages, photos, videos and documents from your *cloud chats* on our servers so that you can access your data from any of your devices anytime without having to rely on third-party backups.
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Stockage et accès aux contenus utilisateur dans les chats cloud

communications.quote: Telegram is a communication service. [...] We store messages, photos, videos and documents from your *cloud chats* on our servers.
communications.purpose: Fournir un service de messagerie et stocker les communications

contacts_reseau.quote: We ask your permission before syncing your contacts. We store your up-to-date contacts in order to notify you as soon as one of your contacts signs up for Telegram and to properly display names in notifications.

donnees_tiers.quote: Telegram offers a tool for advertisers to promote their messages in public one-to-many channels, but these sponsored messages are based solely on the topic of the public channels in which they are shown. [...] Bots are apps that look like special Telegram users: you can talk to them from your chat list, add them to groups or use a special “inline” interface to access their features. By performing any of these actions, you will be sending some of your data to the respective third-party bot developers.
donnees_tiers.purpose: Interaction avec des tiers (bots, annonceurs) et partage de données

autre.quote: Telegram Business subscribers can add a fixed location and a list of opening hours to their profile, to help clients identify and engage with their business more efficiently on Telegram.
autre.purpose: Informations professionnelles pour les abonnés Telegram Business

legal_bases.data: identite, contact, appareil_technique, usage_comportement, contenus_utilisateur, communications, contacts_reseau
legal_bases.quote: We process your personal data on the ground that such processing is necessary to further our legitimate interests (including: *(1)* providing effective and innovative Services to our users; and *(2)* to detect, prevent or otherwise address fraud or security issues in respect of our provision of Services), unless those interests are overridden by your interest or fundamental rights and freedoms that require protections of personal data.

Telegram is a cloud service. We will process your data to deliver your cloud chat history, including messages, media and files, to any devices of your choosing without a need for you to use third-party backups or cloud storage.

We ask your permission before syncing your contacts. [...] If you share a location in a chat, this location data is treated like other messages in cloud or secret chats respectively. [...] By performing any of these actions, you will be sending some of your data to the respective third-party bot developers.

If Telegram receives a valid order from the relevant judicial authorities that confirms you're a suspect in a case involving criminal activities that violate the Telegram Terms of Service, we will perform a legal analysis of the request and may disclose your IP address and phone number to the relevant authorities.

transfers.quote: To provide, improve and support our Services, we may share your personal data with: *(1)* our parent company, Telegram Group Inc, located in the British Virgin Islands, *(2)* Telegraph Inc., a group member also located in the BVI; and *(3)* Telegram FZ-LLC, a group member located in Dubai. [...] Since Telegram may rely on Google LLC or Microsoft Corporation for automatic translation of messages, the text of any message or set of messages that users choose to translate may be shared with Google or Microsoft in order to obtain their translated versions.
